# External Reference Documents — Project 001

Place project-specific external documents here (PDFs, DOCX, images, data files) that inform artifacts in this project. ArcKit commands (`/arckit:requirements`, `/arckit:stakeholders`, `/arckit:research`, etc.) will read them and cite them in generated artifacts.

Enterprise-wide references (that apply to all projects) should live in `projects/000-global/external/` instead.
